sentences.arabic: الصَّدَقَةُ عِبَادَةٌ يُحِبُّهَا اللَّهُ وَتُطْفِئُ غَضَبَهُ.
sentences.translation: Sadaka je ibadet koji Allah voli i kojim se gasi Njegov gnjev.
sentences.translationEn: Sadaqah (voluntary charity) is an act of worship that Allah loves and which extinguishes His anger.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «الصَّدَقَةُ تُطْفِئُ الْخَطِيئَةَ كَمَا يُطْفِئُ الْمَاءُ النَّارَ» [رَوَاهُ التِّرْمِذِيُّ، وَصَحَّحَهُ الْأَلْبَانِيُّ].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: «Sadaka gasi grijeh onako kao što voda gasi vatru» [Bilježi Tirmizi, a vjerodostojnim ga ocijenio Albani].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet, peace be upon him, said: 'Charity extinguishes sin just as water extinguishes fire' [Narrated by al-Tirmidhi, authenticated by al-Albani].

sentences.arabic: وَالصَّدَقَةُ لَيْسَتْ بِالْمَالِ فَقَطْ، بَلْ كُلُّ مَعْرُوفٍ صَدَقَةٌ كَمَا قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الصُّلْحِ].
sentences.translation: Sadaka nije samo novac, nego je svako dobro djelo sadaka, kako je rekao Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem [Bilježi Buharija u Knjizi o pomirenju].
sentences.translationEn: Sadaqah is not only money — every act of kindness is sadaqah, as the Prophet said [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Peacemaking].

sentences.arabic: وَالصَّدَقَةُ لَا تُنْقِصُ الْمَالَ بَلْ تَزِيدُهُ بِبَرَكَةِ اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Sadaka ne umanjuje imetak nego ga povećava Allahovim bereketom.
sentences.translationEn: Sadaqah does not decrease wealth but increases it through Allah's blessing.

sentences.arabic: وَالدَّرْسُ أَنَّ الْمُسْلِمَ يَتَصَدَّقُ بِمَا يَسْتَطِيعُ وَلَوْ بِكَلِمَةٍ طَيِّبَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Pouka je da musliman daje sadaku koliko može, pa makar i lijepom riječju.
sentences.translationEn: The lesson is that a Muslim gives charity according to their ability, even if only with a kind word.
